item.name: Construct VII Core
item.description: Rumors that this core and the mechanical golem it activates are heavily based on an Ivalician design are entirely unfounded. Well, almost.

mount.name: Construct VII
mount.action: Summon forth your Construct VII. Rumors that it is heavily based on an Ivalician design are entirely unfounded. Well, almost.
mount.description: Having taken prisoner what they thought was an automaton during a skirmish with the kobolds, Maelstrom officers were shocked to find that it was instead a type of synthetic golem─but not so shocked as to not immediately bring it to Naldiq & Vymelli's for repair and later sale.
mount.tooltip:
So the kobolds are at it again...
- Anaoc

obj.n: One Steppe at a Time V
